message:
feat(web): local SseEvent/SseResponse implementation

Add SseEvent struct with to_bytes() for SSE wire format encoding and
generic SseResponse<S> for streaming responses. Modify TokioSseStream
to emit Vec<u8> instead of SseEvent items, decoupling from framework
types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
